lines.speaker: Darve
lines.text: What's the device saying now?

lines.speaker: Movario
lines.text: I don't know. It's giving strange readings...

lines.speaker: Movario
lines.text: I'm not even sure it's working any more.

lines.speaker: Darve
lines.text: This is a wild goose chase! We trek halfway across the world and there's nothing down here but this bunch of useless goblins!

lines.speaker: Movario
lines.text: I am sure my triangulation calculations indicated that the source of power was in this rough area...

lines.speaker: Movario
lines.text: I find it encouraging that it's pointed to somewhere where there actually are caves.

lines.speaker: Darve
lines.text: This part of the world is riddled with caves! It's hard not to hit a cave around here! Are you sure you're not just picking up these goblin lanterns or something stupid?

lines.speaker: Movario
lines.text: You should have more faith in my skills as a mage! I've been working on this for years-

lines.speaker: Darve
lines.text: Gah! We have an eavesdropper! Buzz off, adventurer - go talk to the goblins or something.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I won't bother you.

lines.speaker: Movario
lines.text: That's what I like to see: a polite adventurer! Now, where was I...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you looking for?

lines.speaker: Darve
lines.text: None of your business!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, I'm one of you guys! See this pendant?

lines.speaker: Darve
lines.text: Where did you come from? Who sent you? I'll have you know I'm the mage's bodyguard for this job. We don't need anyone else!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No one sent me, I'm just nosy.

lines.speaker: Darve
lines.text: Well stick your nose somewhere else!

lines.speaker: Movario
lines.text: I'm sorry, but pendant or no pendant, this is a secret. I'm sure you understand.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lucien sent me.

lines.speaker: Movario
lines.text: He did not! If he had, I would be aware of it!

lines.speaker: Darve
lines.text: Don't try to lie to us! Now go away!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sure you're a much better bodyguard than me, but perhaps I can help in some non-bodyguarding way?

lines.speaker: Movario
lines.text: Well, we don't know how big this thing is. If we find it, I suppose we might need someone else to help us carry it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, what are we looking for?

lines.speaker: Movario
lines.text: You're not very well briefed, are you?

lines.speaker: Darve
lines.text: To be honest I'm still a bit hazy on that point too.

lines.speaker: Movario
lines.text: *sigh*

lines.speaker: Movario
lines.text: Lucien has asked us to search for artefacts that give off a very specific type of energy. After many years of research, I think I'm finally drawing near.

lines.speaker: Darve
lines.text: You don't sound very sure.

lines.speaker: Movario
lines.text: Bah! My detection device is totally shot. I don't understand it.

lines.speaker: Movario
lines.text: I wouldn't hang around for now, adventurer. It could be a long while before I can get a clear reading.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll be on my way.
